languages.text: Ты не моя цель, не буду терять время на монкай

traits.locale_text: Ты не моя цель, не буду терять время на монкай

languages.text: "I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."
languages.original_text: "Эта бессмысленная возня меня изрядно утомила. Пора вернуться к действительно значимым делам".

traits.locale_text: "I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Time to go back to matters of genuine import."
"I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Time to go back to matters of genuine import."
"I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."
"I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."

languages.text: "Эта бессмысленная возня меня изрядно утомила. Пора вернуться к действительно значимым делам".
"Ich habe diese sinnlose Aufregung langsam satt. Wenden wir uns wieder wichtigen Dingen zu."
languages.original_text: "I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe diese sinnlose Aufregung langsam satt. Wenden wir uns wieder wichtigen Dingen zu."

languages.text: «Me he cansado de esta absurda distracción. Volvamos a los asuntos importantes».
languages.original_text: "I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."

traits.locale_text: «Me he cansado de esta absurda distracción. Volvamos a los asuntos importantes».

languages.text: “我实在厌倦了这场毫无意义的骚乱。我们还是谈点真正要紧的事吧。”
languages.original_text: "I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."

traits.locale_text: “我实在厌倦了这场毫无意义的骚乱。我们还是谈点真正要紧的事吧。”

languages.text: "Bu manasız gürültü patırtıdan çok usandım. Sahiden önem arz eden hususlara dönelim artık."
languages.original_text: "I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."

traits.locale_text: "Bu manasız gürültü patırtıdan çok usandım. Sahiden önem arz eden hususlara dönelim artık."

languages.text: « J'en ai plus qu'assez de toute cette agitation. Revenons-en à ce qui importe vraiment. »
languages.original_text: "I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."

traits.locale_text: « J'en ai plus qu'assez de toute cette agitation. Revenons-en à ce qui importe vraiment. »

languages.text: 「この無駄な騒ぎにうんざりしている。重要なことに戻ろう。」
languages.original_text: "I am quite tired of this pointless commotion. Let us return to matters of genuine import."

traits.locale_text: 「この無駄な騒ぎにうんざりしている。重要なことに戻ろう。」
